scope_note: Slack sweep across channels and DMs. Signals are paraphrased, never verbatim. Display-only: these do not alter the computed confidence numbers.

signals.headline: 3 zero-credit items ON HOLD
signals.text: Three Raven zero-credit work items are ON HOLD — the BE zero-credit & credit-recharge fix is stuck in code review, with the AI-agent activate/deactivate and FE zero-credit-state items QA-pending behind it.

signals.headline: Restrictions + Offline Billing unverified
signals.text: Restrictions and Offline Billing remain unverified by QA — flagged 'unaware' across consecutive QA status updates, now awaiting the Lead EM's confirmation; QA has asked whether zero-credit is ready to test on stage and for ENGG-846 / ENGG-2034 to be updated.

signals.headline: Review items not on master; demo pending
signals.text: PM escalated for an overall release update: several Billing items were still in code review (not on master) during release week, with master-merge and test timing unconfirmed; the Billing v3 demo video is also still pending, deferred to the Lead EM.

signals.headline: Core surfaces QA-tested
signals.text: Core billing surfaces are QA-tested: Customer Portal, WhatsApp Credits, Raven Credits, Pricing Plans, and automatic credit top-up all confirmed tested.

signals.headline: Partial scope live, QA gaps
signals.text: Parts of Billing v3 are already live incrementally — WhatsApp Prepaid, WhatsApp Credits, and Raven Credits released ahead of the rest, with WhatsApp Prepaid shipped without QA.

signals.headline: Blocked: pending BE task
signals.text: Still blocked by a pending BE task — flagged by QA against ENGG-2021 (comment point 2) in the latest status update.

signals.headline: Coupled — follows Billing v3
signals.text: Coupling reconfirmed in the leadership channel: RBAC does not release without Billing v3 — its date follows Billing's.

signals.headline: Follow-on Raven RBAC queued
signals.text: Follow-on scope queued, not gating: ENGG-2568 (Raven RBAC — AI Agents queue, Raven module, AI Performance Reports) filed and assigned to EM 1, explicitly to start only after RBAC + Billing ship.

signals.headline: No movement — Jun 15 missed
signals.text: No movement visible in the sweep window — both work items sat in code review through Thursday's Rollout Gate (Jun 11), and the owner's visible Slack activity covered unrelated fixes only. Not QA-passed by the gate means the Jun 15 window is effectively missed.

signals.headline: ETA slipped past gate → Jun 22
signals.text: ETA on ENGG-2305 updated to Jun 14 (Sunday) — past the Jun 11 Rollout Gate, so the Jun 15 Monday window is out of reach; next realistic slot is Jun 22.

signals.headline: GA gated on Raven RBAC
signals.text: Global release now sequenced behind the follow-on Raven RBAC work (ENGG-2568) — leadership agreed it is safer to do after RBAC + Billing ship; phased rollout continues meanwhile.

signals.headline: Rollout iterating on plan
signals.text: Phased rollout iterating — the stock-scheduler 6h-interval task (ENGG-2558) moved to code review with a Jun 10 ETA.
